title: Curried Mango Chicken & Garlicky Rice with Greens
summary: Sticky, curry-glazed chicken with tangy mango sauce, garlicky rice and wilted greens. Who said healthy food had to be boring?

method.description: Rinse the jasmine rice in a saucepan under cold water until it runs clear. Add the measured water and a big pinch of salt.

Bash the garlic cloves for the rice and remove their skins. Add them to the rice and place over a high heat. Bring to the boil, cover with a lid, then turn the heat down to low. Cook for 12 mins, then remove from the heat and leave to steam, lid on, for 10 mins.

Butterfly the chicken breasts. In a bowl, mix together the curry powder and half the olive oil. Season generously with salt and pepper, then toss the chicken through the marinade until well coated. Set aside.
Set a large frying pan over a medium heat with the remaining olive oil. Once hot, add the kale and cook for 2-3 mins until just wilted. Transfer to a plate.
Add the chicken to the empty pan and cook for 10-15 mins, turning halfway, until golden on both sides.
Finely grate the garlic and ginger into a small bowl. Stir through the mango chutney and water to make a loose sauce.
Once the chicken is golden, pour in the mango sauce and cook, basting, until it glazes the chicken and the meat is cooked through, 5-6 mins.
Use scissors to snip any large watercress into smaller pieces. Add it to the chicken with the kale, cover with a lid and leave to steam over low heat for 2-4 mins until the greens have wilted.
Fluff the rice with a fork and divide between plates. Top with the glazed chicken, greens and any extra sauce from the pan. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
